<process dayOfNotifyPrivileger="15" description="modelName=com.landray.kmss.km.review.model.KmReviewTemplate&modelKey=reviewMainDoc&templateId=1887a98750756b5ba35b02047e6a6a30&lbpmTmpId=1887a98ed2add80bae782f84ce4aeee7" fdId="18aa6a36e402de460ce3f9645289f76a" hourOfNotifyPrivileger="0" iconType="2" linesIndex="79" minuteOfNotifyPrivileger="0" nodesIndex="55" notifyDraftOnFinish="true" notifyOnFinish="true" notifyType="todo" orgAttribute="privilegerIds:privilegerNames" privilegerIds="16701c8f94a1ca058b89d3b42cbb09f9" privilegerNames="电气数科运营优化中心_商务经理" recalculateHandler="true" rejectReturn="false"> <nodes> <startNode id="N1" name="开始节点" x="500" y="40"/> <draftNode id="N2" name="起草节点" orgAttributes="otherCanViewCurNodeIds:otherCanViewCurNodeNames" x="500" y="100"/> <reviewNode handlerIds=" import java.util.ArrayList; import java.util.List; import com.landray.kmss.sys.organization.model.SysOrgPerson; List handlers = new ArrayList(); List proManagers = $fd_pur_pay_req.fd_wbs_pmid$; if (null!=proManagers) { String personCode = ""; for (int i=0;i<proManagers.size();i++) { if(personCode.contains(proManagers.get(i))){ continue; } personCode=personCode+proManagers.get(i).toString()+";"; SysOrgPerson handler = $组织架构.根据登录名取用户$(proManagers.get(i)); if (null != handler) { handlers.add(handler); } } } return handlers;" handlerNames=" import java.util.ArrayList; import java.util.List; import com.landray.kmss.sys.organization.model.SysOrgPerson; List handlers = new ArrayList(); List proManagers = $明细表1.项目经理工号$; if (null!=proManagers) { String personCode = ""; for (int i=0;i<proManagers.size();i++) { if(personCode.contains(proManagers.get(i))){ continue; } personCode=personCode+proManagers.get(i).toString()+";"; SysOrgPerson handler = $组织架构.根据登录名取用户$(proManagers.get(i)); if (null != handler) { handlers.add(handler); } } } return handlers;" handlerSelectType="formula" id="N21" ignoreOnHandlerEmpty="true" name="项目经理" optHandlerCalType="2" optHandlerSelectType="org" orgAttributes="optHandlerIds:optHandlerNames;otherCanViewCurNodeIds:otherCanViewCurNodeNames" processType="2" recalculateHandler="true" ("" .equals($XPM编号$ ) ) " endNodeId="N32" endPosition="1" id="L39" name="XPM付款申请" points="560,1300;620,1300;620,1380" priority="0" startNodeId="N31" startPosition="2"/> <line condition="1 == 1" disCondition="1 == 1" endNodeId="N3" endPosition="1" id="L38" name="非XPM付款申请" points="500,1340;500,1500" priority="1" startNodeId="N31" startPosition="3"/> <line condition=" ! ("" .equals($XPM编号$ ) ) " endNodeId="N40" endPosition="1" id="L49" name="XPM付款申请" points="1100,1300;1160,1300;1160,1380" priority="0" startNodeId="N39" startPosition="2"/> <line condition="1 == 1" disCondition="1 == 1" endNodeId="N3" endPosition="1" id="L60" name="非XPM付款申请" points="1040,1340;1040,1500;500,1500" priority="1" startNodeId="N39" startPosition="3"/> <line condition=" ! <draftNode canModifyFlow="false" canModifyHandlerNodeIds="N21" canModifyNotionPopedom="false" hourOfRejectNotifyDraft="0" id="N2" minuteOfRejectNotifyDraft="0" name="起草节点" orgAttributes="otherCanViewCurNodeIds:otherCanViewCurNodeNames" rejectNotifyDraft="0" x="500" y="100"/>

<reviewNode canModifyFlow="false" canModifyMainDoc="false" canModifyNotionPopedom="false" dayOfNotify="3" dayOfPass="0" handlerIds=" import java.util.ArrayList; import java.util.List; import com.landray.kmss.sys.organization.model.SysOrgPerson; List handlers = new ArrayList(); List proManagers = $fd_pur_pay_req.fd_wbs_pmid$; if (null!=proManagers) { String personCode = ""; for (int i=0;i<proManagers.size();i++) { if(personCode.contains(proManagers.get(i))){ continue; } personCode=personCode+proManagers.get(i).toString()+";"; SysOrgPerson handler = $组织架构.根据登录名取用户$(proManagers.get(i)); if (null != handler) { handlers.add(handler); } } } return handlers;" handlerNames=" import java.util.ArrayList; import java.util.List; import com.landray.kmss.sys.organization.model.SysOrgPerson; List handlers = new ArrayList(); List proManagers = $明细表1.项目经理工号$; if (null!=proManagers) { String personCode = ""; for (int i=0;i<proManagers.size();i++) { if(personCode.contains(proManagers.get(i))){ continue; } personCode=personCode+proManagers.get(i).toString()+";"; SysOrgPerson handler = $组织架构.根据登录名取用户$(proManagers.get(i)); if (null != handler) { handlers.add(handler); } } } return handlers;" handlerSelectType="formula" hourOfNotify="0" hourOfPass="0" hourOfTranNotifyDraft="0" hourOfTranNotifyPrivate="0" id="N21" ignoreOnHandlerEmpty="true" ignoreOnHandlerSame="false" minuteOfNotify="0" minuteOfPass="0" minuteOfTranNotifyDraft="0" minuteOfTranNotifyPrivate="0" name="项目经理" onAdjoinHandlerSame="false" optHandlerCalType="2" optHandlerSelectType="org" orgAttributes="optHandlerIds:optHandlerNames;otherCanViewCurNodeIds:otherCanViewCurNodeNames" processType="2" recalculateHandler="true" tranNotifyDraft="3" tranNotifyPrivate="3" useOptHandlerOnly="false" x="500" y="160"> <operations refId="13c5ae137925b6f5b55b6cf4051ac33a"/> </reviewNode>
<autoBranchNode id="N33" name="条件分支" x="500" y="240"/>

<reviewNode canModifyFlow="false" canModifyMainDoc="false" canModifyNotionPopedom="false" dayOfNotify="3" dayOfPass="0" handlerIds="import java.util.List; List deptCodes = $fd_pur_pay_req.departmentCode$; if(deptCodes.size()>0){ return $部门领导.根据部门编号获取部门领导$(deptCodes.get(0)); }else{ return null; } " handlerNames="import java.util.List; List deptCodes = $明细表1.WBS所属部门Code$; if(deptCodes.size()>0){ return $部门领导.根据部门编号获取部门领导$(deptCodes.get(0)); }else{ return null; } " handlerSelectType="formula" hourOfNotify="0" hourOfPass="0" hourOfTranNotifyDraft="0" hourOfTranNotifyPrivate="0" id="N27" ignoreOnHandlerEmpty="false" ignoreOnHandlerSame="true" minuteOfNotify="0" minuteOfPass="0" minuteOfTranNotifyDraft="0" minuteOfTranNotifyPrivate="0" name="部门领导" onAdjoinHandlerSame="true" optHandlerCalType="2" optHandlerSelectType="org" orgAttributes="optHandlerIds:optHandlerNames;otherCanViewCurNodeIds:otherCanViewCurNodeNames" processType="0" recalculateHandler="true" tranNotifyDraft="3" tranNotifyPrivate="3" useOptHandlerOnly="false" x="660" y="800"> <operations refId="13c5ae137925b6f5b55b6cf4051ac33a"/> </reviewNode>
